testcase.name: migrates legacy oc-1 to oc-2 before mount
keeps cached css for non-default themes
should preserve text attributes (bold, italic, underline)
should preserve basic 16-color foreground colors
should preserve 256-color palette colors
should preserve RGB/truecolor colors
should preserve background colors
should handle combined colors and attributes
should not produce ECH sequences
multi-line content should not have garbage characters
serialized output should restore after Terminal.reset()
alternate buffer should round-trip without garbage
serialized output written to new terminal should match original colors
builds trimmed config payload
flags duplicate rows and allows reconnecting disabled providers
root lists on mount unless already loaded or loading
nested dirs list only when expanded and stale
allowed auto-expand picks only collapsed dirs
append and trim keeps max bounded
back and forward indexes stay correct after trimming
action-driven navigation does not push duplicate history entries
parseKeybind handles aliases and multiple combos
parseKeybind treats none and empty as disabled
matchKeybind normalizes punctuation keys
matchKeybind supports bracket keys
formatKeybind returns human readable output
formatKeybind prefers the first combo
replaces keyed registrations
keeps unkeyed registrations additive
keeps file list behavior and aggregate chronological order
remove updates file and aggregate indexes consistently
clear resets file and aggregate indexes plus focus state
remove keeps focus when same comment id exists in another file
setFocus and setActive updater callbacks receive current state
update changes only the targeted comment body
replace swaps comment state and clears focus state
updates byte totals incrementally for set, overwrite, remove, and reset
evicts by entry cap using LRU order
evicts by byte cap while preserving protected entries
keeps pinned stores and evicts idle stores
uses limited roots query when supported
falls back to full roots query on limited-query failure
keeps exact total for full fetches
marks has-more for full-limit limited fetches
keeps exact total when limited fetch is under limit
rejects pinned or inflight directories
accepts idle unpinned directory store
debounces persisted scroll writes
reseeds empty cache after persisted snapshot loads
couples touch and scroll seed in order
reads dynamic accessor keys lazily
keeps active key and drops lowest-used keys
does not prune without keep key
resolves configured agent variant when model matches
ignores configured variant when model does not match
prefers selected variant over configured variant
lets an explicit default override the configured variant
cycles from configured variant to next
wraps from configured last variant to first
cycles from an explicit default to the first variant
uses workspace-only directory cache key
keeps workspace storage path when no legacy session id
includes legacy session path before workspace path
drops invalid terminals and restores a valid active terminal
keeps a valid active id
uses a parent session's directory-scoped auto-accept
uses a parent session's legacy auto-accept key
defaults to requiring approval when no lineage override exists
inherits a parent session's false override
prefers a child override over parent override
falls back to directory-level auto-accept
session-level override takes precedence over directory-level
returns true when directory key is set
returns false when directory key is not set
returns false when directory key is explicitly false
applyOptimisticAdd inserts message in sorted order and stores parts
applyOptimisticRemove removes message and part entries
mergeOptimisticPage keeps pending messages in fetched timelines
mergeOptimisticPage keeps missing optimistic parts until the server has them
mergeOptimisticPage confirms echoed messages once all parts arrive
non-English locales translate targeted unseen session keys
navigates via registered navigate function
does not navigate when href is missing
falls back to location.assign without registered navigate
does not cache values as persisted when quota write and eviction fail
disables only the failing scope when storage throws
failing fallback scope does not poison direct storage scope
normalizer rejects malformed JSON payloads
workspace storage sanitizes Windows filename characters
detects and disposes disposable values
ignores non-disposable values
sets options only when setter exists
reads hovered link text safely
resolves speech recognition constructor with webkit precedence
returns undefined when no valid speech constructor exists
evicts least-recently-used entry when max is reached
disposes entries on delete and clear
expires stale entries with ttl and recreates on get
formats issues with file path
uses trimmed message when issues are missing
formats config invalid errors
returns error messages
returns provided string errors
uses translated unknown fallback
falls back for unknown error objects and names
formats provider model errors using provider/model
formats provider model suggestions
returns healthy response with version
returns unhealthy when request fails
uses timeout fallback when AbortSignal.timeout is unavailable
uses provided abort signal
retries transient failures and eventually succeeds
returns unhealthy when retries are exhausted
buffers and flushes once per schedule
flush is a no-op when empty
flush waits for pending write completion
uses randomUUID in secure contexts
falls back in insecure contexts
falls back when randomUUID throws
falls back when randomUUID is unavailable
normalizes trailing slashes
pending does not overwrite a terminal state
wait resolves shared pending waiter when ready
wait resolves with failure message
restores multiple uploaded attachments
estimates tokens and keeps remaining tokens as other
scales segments when estimates exceed input
computes totals and usage from latest assistant with tokens
preserves fallback labels and null usage when model metadata is missing
recomputes when message array is mutated in place
returns empty metrics when inputs are undefined
keeps PDFs when the browser reports the mime
normalizes structured text types to text/plain
accepts text files even with a misleading browser mime
rejects binary files
uses native paste for short single-line text
uses manual paste for multiline text
uses manual paste for large text
createTextFragment preserves newlines with consecutive br nodes
createTextFragment keeps trailing newline as terminal break
createTextFragment avoids break-node explosion for large multiline content
createTextFragment keeps terminal break in large multiline fallback
length helpers treat breaks as one char and ignore zero-width chars
setCursorPosition and getCursorPosition round-trip with pills and breaks
setCursorPosition and getCursorPosition round-trip across blank lines
prependHistoryEntry skips empty prompt and deduplicates consecutive entries
navigatePromptHistory restores saved prompt when moving down from newest
navigatePromptHistory keeps entry comments when moving through history
normalizePromptHistoryEntry supports legacy prompt arrays
helpers clone prompt and count text content length
canNavigateHistoryAtCursor only allows prompt boundaries
returns shell placeholder in shell mode
returns summarize placeholders for comment context
returns default placeholder with example when suggestions enabled
returns simple placeholder when suggestions disabled
reads the latest worktree accessor value per submit
applies auto-accept to newly created sessions
includes the selected variant on optimistic prompts
seeds new sessions before optimistic prompts are added
builds typed request and optimistic parts without cast path
keeps multiple uploaded attachments in order
deduplicates context files when prompt already includes same path
adds file parts for @mentions inside comment text
handles Windows paths correctly (simulated on macOS)
handles Windows absolute path with special characters
handles Linux absolute paths correctly
handles macOS paths correctly
handles context files with Windows paths
handles absolute Windows paths (user manually specifies full path)
handles selection with query parameters on Windows
handles file paths with dots and special segments on Windows
normalizes file inputs against workspace root
normalizes Windows absolute paths with mixed separators
keeps query/hash stripping behavior stable
unquotes git escaped octal path strings
should handle Linux absolute path
should handle Linux path with special characters
should handle Linux relative path
should handle Linux root directory
should handle Linux path with all special chars
should handle macOS absolute path
should handle macOS path with spaces
should handle Windows absolute path with backslashes
should handle mixed separator path (Windows + Unix)
should handle Windows path with spaces
should handle Windows path with special chars in filename
should handle Windows root directory
should handle Windows relative path with backslashes
should NOT create invalid URL like the bug report
should handle lowercase drive letters
should preserve Unix paths unchanged (except encoding)
should normalize Windows paths for cross-platform use
should handle relative paths the same on all platforms
should handle empty path
should handle path with multiple consecutive slashes
should encode Unicode characters
should handle already normalized Windows path
should handle just drive letter
should handle Windows path with trailing backslash
should handle very long paths
should handle paths with dots
should handle file with # in name
should handle file with ? in name
should handle file with % in name
should work with query parameters (Linux)
testcase.classname: Integration with file:// URL construction > encodeFilePath

testcase.name: should work with query parameters (Windows)
testcase.classname: Integration with file:// URL construction > encodeFilePath

testcase.name: should parse correctly in URL constructor (Linux)
testcase.classname: Integration with file:// URL construction > encodeFilePath

testcase.name: should parse correctly in URL constructor (Windows)
testcase.classname: Integration with file:// URL construction > encodeFilePath

testcase.name: reloads open files and refreshes loaded parent on add
reloads files that are open in tabs
refreshes only changed loaded directory nodes
ignores invalid or git watcher updates
does not evict the active directory during mark
stores and clears message metadata by directory
dedupes inflight work
clears a whole directory
refreshes stale first-page prefetched history
keeps deeper or complete history cached
dropSessionCaches clears orphaned parts without message rows
dropSessionCaches clears message-backed parts
pickSessionCacheEvictions preserves requested sessions
keeps base roots and recent roots beyond the limit
keeps children when root is kept, permission exists, or child is recent
keeps array payloads
wraps a single agent payload
extracts agents from keyed objects
drops invalid payloads
upserts project.updated in sorted position
handles global.disposed by triggering refresh
handles server.connected by triggering refresh
inserts root sessions in sorted order and updates sessionTotal
cleans session caches when archived
cleans session caches when deleted and decrements only root totals
cleans caches for trimmed sessions on session.created
cleanupDroppedSessionCaches clears part-only orphan state
upserts and removes messages while clearing orphaned parts
upserts and prunes message parts
tracks permission and question request lifecycles
updates vcs branch in store and cache
routes disposal and lsp events to side-effect handlers
parses open-project deep links
ignores non-project deep links
ignores malformed deep links safely
parses links when URL.canParse is unavailable
ignores open-project deep links without directory
collects only valid open-project directories
parses new-session deep links with optional prompt
ignores new-session deep links without directory
collects only valid new-session deep links
drains global deep links once
normalizes trailing slash in workspace key
preserves posix and drive roots in workspace key
keeps local first while preserving known order
finds the latest root session across workspaces
detects project permissions with a filter
ignores project permissions filtered out
ignores archived and child sessions when finding latest root session
formats fallback project display name
extracts api error message and fallback
does not scroll when width shrinks
scrolls to start when context tab opens
scrolls to right edge for new file tabs
opens and loads selected review file
activates the opened file tab
focuses textarea when present
falls back to terminal element focus
skips pure modifier keys
skips shortcut key combos
keeps plain typing focused on terminal
returns target index for valid drag reorder
returns undefined for unknown droppable id
normalizes the effective file tab
prefers context and review fallbacks when no file tab is active
converts line mode to px
converts page mode to container height
keeps pixel mode unchanged
marks when nested scroller cannot scroll
marks when scrolling beyond top boundary
marks when scrolling beyond bottom boundary
does not mark when nested scroller can consume movement
returns custom title unchanged
normalizes default numbered title
falls back to generic title
parses hash with leading #
parses raw hash fragment
ignores non-message anchors
restores the last message through session state
clears draft session state
prefers the current session permission
returns a nested child permission
returns undefined without a matching tree permission
skips filtered permissions in the current tree
returns undefined when all tree permissions are filtered out
prefers the current session question
returns a nested child question
hides when there are no todos
opens while the session is still working
closes completed todos after a running turn
clears stale todos when the turn ends
clears completed todos when the session is no longer live
